name: Drizly
root_cause: Inactive GitHub account compromised via reused password, granting AWS credential access in source code
impact: RDS Instance with 2.5 million users data exfiltrated

links.text: FTC Takes Action Against Drizly and its CEO James Cory Rellas for Security Failures that Exposed Data of 2.5 Million Consumers
